notes: Drop phone_number (ID) and 4 charge cols (perfect linear duplicates of minutes cols, r=1.000, audit 2026-07-12).
Target Bad->1, Good->0. Sentinels -9/-8/-7 left intact (raw) — full sentinel decode is a D3-time concern, not preprocessing-time. 588 documented duplicate rows retained.
Drop date (temporal ID). Target DOWN->0, UP->1.
Target bool False->0, True->1. 2,061 duplicate rows retained (documented uniqueness defect).
Filter target to Male/Female (drops 19,824 Unknown/3.0 — resolves the spot-check FAIL). Subsample 343,419->50,000 (seed=42) AFTER filtering.
No transforms needed. Cleanest dataset in corpus.
Drop PageValues (soft leakage: single-feature AUC=0.8633, audit 2026-07-12). Target bool False->0, True->1.

Binarize: <30 days readmission=1, else=0 (resolves the spot-check FAIL — raw file has 3 label values NO/>30/<30). Drop 15 near-constant drug cols. Subsample 101,766->50,000 (seed=42) AFTER binarization.
Target Y->1 (majority), N->0 (minority 32.31%). 23,766 NaN cells retained.
No transforms needed. Temporal signal — blocked CV required in Phase 1 (not this script's concern).

Binarize: correct==1->1, else->0 (resolves spot-check FAIL — raw file has 13 fractional partial-credit values). Drop 25 leakage/ID/constant cols, leaving 9 features. Subsample 6,123,270->25,000 (seed=42) AFTER binarization.
